common.tagline:
ENTERPRISE RISK MANAGEMENT
INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS

slide1.headline: Strategic Consulting & Advisory Services Powered by

slide2.headline: Expert guidance that transforms intelligence into

hero.purposeStatement: We provide strategic intelligence and executive-ready guidance through compliance advisory and virtual CISO leadership. Our consulting approach integrates seamlessly with the ERMITS ecosystem, delivering actionable roadmaps and implementation support tailored to your organization's unique risk profile.

methodology.subtitle: Our Methodology
methodology.title: Powered by STEEL™
methodology.description: Strategic Threat & Enterprise Evaluation Layer — a comprehensive framework that evaluates your organization across strategic, threat, and enterprise dimensions to deliver prioritized, actionable intelligence.

card.title: From Assessment to Action
card.description: STEEL™ evaluates 18 strategic questions across multiple layers to create a prioritized roadmap for your cybersecurity and risk management initiatives. No generic checklists — only what matters for your business.

serviceArchitecture.subtitle: Service Architecture
serviceArchitecture.title: How ERMITS Advisory Works
serviceArchitecture.description: Strategic cyber governance delivered in four integrated services. Click to explore each:

engagement.subtitle: Typical Engagement model
engagement.title: A compact, outcome-driven engagement — not another endless audit
engagement.description: ERMITS Advisory is built by practitioners who have lived inside GRC, cyber, and supply-chain teams. The process is designed to be lean, transparent, and immediately actionable.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Scope & signal design
step1.description: We define your STEEL™ profile (sector, regions, data types, vendors, regulatory perimeter) and select relevant open data & RSS sources.
items: Threat & regulation inventory.
Vendor & SBOM footprint sketch.
Risk appetite & board expectations.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: STEEL™ run & workshop
step2.description: We execute STEEL™, build the landscape dashboards, and run an interactive session with your stakeholders.
items: Visual threat weather & strategic risk overlays.
Scenario-based risk scores.
Pre-mapping to ERMITS tools.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Strategic roadmap with ERMITS ecosystem mapping
step3.description: You receive a concise strategic roadmap that links each priority finding to the relevant ERMITS ecosystem capabilities and implementation approach.
items: Ranked recommendations (90-day view).
Which ERMITS ecosystem capabilities to activate first and why.
Options for ongoing STEEL™ monitoring if you want a live dashboard.

useCases.subtitle: Use cases
useCases.title: Where STEEL™ delivers outsized value first
useCases.description: Start where the threat landscape is moving faster than your internal bandwidth. ERMITS Advisory focuses STEEL™ on concrete decision points — not academic models.

smb.title: SMBs under ransomware pressure
smb.description: Identify which ransomware families, regions, and attack chains matter for your sector, then prioritize affordable controls instead of generic checklists.

privacy.title: Privacy-heavy service providers
privacy.description: Blend regulatory risk (GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, DPDP, etc.) with behavioral trends and data broker exposure to build a realistic privacy roadmap.

vendor.title: Complex vendor & SBOM exposure
vendor.description: Combine geopolitics, regulation, and software supply-chain indicators to see where your vendor stack and SBOMs are most fragile.

publicSector.title: Public sector & education
publicSector.description: Use STEEL™ to translate national threat bulletins and policy changes into pragmatic steps for municipalities, schools, and agencies.

trustIndicators.title: Industry-Standard Frameworks
trustIndicators.description: Our methodology aligns with recognized security and compliance frameworks

finalCta.title: Ready to Get Started?
finalCta.description: Let's discuss how ERMITS Advisory can help strengthen your cybersecurity posture and governance.
benefits: Designed for small and mid-size organizations

disclaimer.label: Disclaimer:
disclaimer.text: Results, outcomes, and timelines may vary based on individual organization circumstances, size, complexity, industry, and implementation efforts. Performance claims are based on typical experiences and are not guarantees. Case studies and examples are illustrative and may not reflect all client experiences. Pricing is subject to change and final pricing will be confirmed in written proposals. ERMITS Advisory services are advisory in nature and do not guarantee specific security outcomes or compliance certifications.

hero.title: Leadership Excellence
hero.subtitle: Our founding leadership brings together decades of cybersecurity expertise, legal knowledge, and strategic advisory experience.

businessExperience.title: Business Experience
businessExperience.description: Operational and commercial leadership across Fortune 500 organizations, international trade, and supply chains.

internationalTrade.title: Global Commerce
internationalTrade.description: Experience in cross-border operations, customs requirements, and the governance of international trade and compliance frameworks.

agroIndustries.title: Agro-Industries
agroIndustries.description: Work in agricultural and food-sector supply chains, focusing on traceability, export obligations, and alignment with global standards.

operations.title: Operations Management
operations.description: Oversight of complex logistics networks, inventory flows, and end-to-end performance with an emphasis on resilience and process integrity.

technicalCertifications.title: Technical Certifications
technicalCertifications.description: Credentials supporting security governance, risk, and compliance programs.

cissp.name: CISSP
cissp.description: Security architecture, governance, and risk-driven control design for enterprise environments.

cisa.name: CISA
cisa.description: Information systems auditing, control evaluation, and regulatory alignment.

pmp.name: PMP
pmp.description: Structuring and delivering high-impact initiatives with disciplined execution.

pmiacp.name: PMI-ACP
pmiacp.description: Agile delivery across dynamic operational and compliance-focused programs.

legalCredentials.title: Legal Credentials
legalCredentials.description: Legal and regulatory fluency at the intersection of privacy, cybersecurity, and public law.

jdllm.name: J.D. & LL.M.
jdllm.description: Background in federal litigation, public records laws, and regulatory frameworks with advanced knowledge of privacy and cybersecurity legislation.

professionalMemberships.title: Professional Memberships
professionalMemberships.description: Our team members maintain active memberships in leading professional associations.
list: Information Systems Audit and Control Association (ISACA)
International Information System Security Certification Consortium (ISC2)

crossSector.title: CROSS-SECTOR INSIGHT
crossSector.text1: Where legal understanding, cybersecurity expertise, and global trade experience intersect to solve real-world risk challenges.
crossSector.text2: ERMITS-Advisory combines technical certifications, legal training, and operational leadership to design practical, compliance-aligned solutions for complex environments.

strategicCapabilities.title: Strategic Capabilities
strategicCapabilities.description: Integrated services that connect governance, privacy, and operational resilience.

items.title: Cybersecurity Governance
items.description: Design and evaluation of governance frameworks aligned with NIST, ISO, and sector-specific requirements.

items.title: Privacy Compliance Architecture
items.description: Program blueprints grounded in GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, and ISO 27701 to operationalize privacy-by-design.

items.title: Operational Risk Management
items.description: Identification, mitigation, and monitoring of enterprise risk across people, process, and technology.

items.title: Supply Chain Resilience
items.description: Risk modeling and assurance for multi-tier supply chains with reference to NIST SP 800-161 and related standards.

items.title: Global Regulatory Alignment
items.description: Cross-jurisdiction mapping of cybersecurity, privacy, and trade obligations into coherent, executable requirements.

globalReach.title: Global Reach, Local Sensibility
globalReach.description: While headquartered in the United States, our advisory services extend worldwide, providing strategic cybersecurity guidance to organizations across diverse markets and regulatory environments.

globalThreat.title: Global Threat Intelligence
globalThreat.description: Comprehensive threat landscape monitoring across all major regions

legalFramework.title: International Legal Framework
legalFramework.description: Knowledge of global cybersecurity regulations and compliance requirements

strategicImplementation.title: Strategic Implementation
strategicImplementation.description: Methodologies adapted to local business and cultural contexts

globalReach.imageSubtitle: Strategic cybersecurity guidance across global markets

hero.title: ERMITS Advisory Services
hero.subtitle: A focused set of governance and stewardship services built on top of the STEEL™ Diagnostic framework.

items.title: STEEL™ Diagnostic
items.description: A structured diagnostic that uses STEEL™—the Strategic Threat & Enterprise Evaluation Layer—to understand your current posture and generate a STEEL™ Index.
whatWeDo: Run a STEEL™ Diagnostic across strategic, threat, and enterprise dimensions
Generate a STEEL™ Index (Strategic, Threat, and Enterprise scores)
Identify priority gaps, dependencies, and quick wins
Provide baseline diagnostic for governance and transformation planning
items.whoItsFor: Organizations that need a structured baseline diagnostic, often at the start of a transformation or in response to heightened regulatory, customer, or board pressure.

items.title: Strategic Roadmap Development
items.description: Transform STEEL™ Diagnostic results into an actionable, prioritized governance and transformation roadmap aligned with your business objectives and risk appetite.
whatWeDo: Translate STEEL™ Index scores into strategic priorities
Develop sequenced implementation roadmap with timelines
Prioritize initiatives based on business impact and risk severity
Map roadmap to ERMITS ecosystem capabilities
Create governance structures to support execution
items.whoItsFor: Organizations that have completed a STEEL™ Diagnostic and need a clear, prioritized path forward for cyber governance and risk management transformation.

items.title: vCISO Stewardship
items.description: Fractional or part-time executive security leadership focused on governance, risk, and resilience—not just technology and alerts.
whatWeDo: Provide vCISO leadership operating on top of the STEEL™ Diagnostic layer
Translate technical and threat realities into board-ready narratives
Oversee execution of the STEEL™-aligned roadmap
Coordinate internal teams and external vendors across the ERMITS ecosystem
Continuously update leadership on risk posture using the STEEL™ Index
items.whoItsFor: Organizations that require dedicated security leadership but don't have—or don't want to start with—a full-time CISO, and that value governance and stewardship over purely operational metrics.

items.title: GRC+ Advisory
items.description: Strategic guidance for aligning governance, risk management, and compliance with your business model, risk appetite, and regulatory context—enhanced with STEEL™ intelligence.
whatWeDo: Design and refine governance structures and decision rights
Align risk management with business and regulatory expectations
Support frameworks such as ISO, NIST, SOC 2, and sector-specific regimes
Connect GRC work to STEEL™ Diagnostic and the ERMITS ecosystem
Enhance traditional GRC with threat intelligence and enterprise context
items.whoItsFor: Organizations facing growing regulatory complexity, customer due diligence pressure, or internal fragmentation around risk and compliance responsibilities.

items.title: Vendor & Ecosystem Governance
items.description: Advisory support focused on managing risk across vendors, partners, and supply chains, aligned with the Enterprise Evaluation Layer in STEEL™.
whatWeDo: Assess vendor and third-party risk posture using STEEL™ inputs
Define governance models and requirements for vendors and partners
Align contract expectations, due diligence, and monitoring
Coordinate with VendorSoluce™ and other ERMITS capabilities as needed
items.whoItsFor: Organizations with complex supply chains, critical vendors, or regulatory expectations around third-party and ecosystem risk.

items.title: Executive & Board Reporting
items.description: Structured reporting and facilitation that helps executives and boards understand, question, and act on cyber risk information anchored in the STEEL™ Index.
whatWeDo: Design reporting that maps STEEL™ outcomes into business language
Support leadership meetings, board sessions, and critical decision points
Provide external perspective on risk, resilience, and ecosystem dependencies
Align messaging to regulatory and stakeholder expectations
items.whoItsFor: Organizations where cyber has become a board-level topic and leadership needs structured, credible, and non-technical framing of complex realities.

finalCta.title: Design the Right Engagement with ERMITS Advisory
finalCta.description: Every engagement starts with understanding your context. From a focused STEEL™ Diagnostic to an ongoing vCISO stewardship model, ERMITS Advisory can be calibrated to your scale, sector, and urgency.

whatIsSteel.title: What Is STEEL™?
whatIsSteel.description1: It is not a checklist or a single score—it is a structured diagnostic architecture that ERMITS Advisory uses to understand where you are, what pressures you face, and what needs to happen next.
whatIsSteel.description2: STEEL™ combines three internal diagnostic sublayers into one coherent method: the

pestelFoundation.title: Built on PESTEL, Enhanced for Cybersecurity
pestelFoundation.description1: STEEL™ is built on the proven foundation of
pestelFoundation.pestelDescription: (Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Environmental, Legal) — a strategic framework used by organizations worldwide to understand external factors affecting their business.
pestelFoundation.description3: by adding three critical evaluation dimensions that PESTEL alone doesn't address:

strategicLayer.title: Strategic Layer
strategicLayer.description: How cyber risk integrates with business strategy, governance, and board-level decision-making

threatLayer.title: Threat Layer
threatLayer.description: Real-time threat intelligence, attack surface analysis, and incident readiness specific to your sector

enterpriseLayer.title: Enterprise Layer
enterpriseLayer.description: Internal capabilities, vendor dependencies, controls maturity, and operational resilience

pestelFoundation.conclusion: STEEL™ maintains PESTEL's strategic rigor while adding the cyber-specific depth that executives need to make informed security investments and understand their true risk posture.

advisoryUses.title: How ERMITS Advisory Uses STEEL™
advisoryUses.description: ERMITS Advisory operates on top of the STEEL™ layer. We run STEEL™ Diagnostics to establish: where you are today, what pressures matter most, and what the next moves should be.
items: Assess your posture across the three STEEL™ sublayers
Generate a STEEL™ Index that reflects your real exposure and readiness
Translate the STEEL™ Index into a governance and transformation roadmap
Support executives and boards with STEEL™-aligned reporting and decision support
Govern ongoing execution using STEEL™ as the reference layer

sublayers.title: The STEEL™ Diagnostic Sublayers

strategic.title: Strategic Diagnostic Layer
strategic.description: The Strategic Diagnostic Layer examines how cyber risk and resilience intersect with your business and governance model.
items: Business and mission alignment
Governance structures and accountability
Risk appetite, tolerance, and decision thresholds
Regulatory and market expectations
Executive and board priorities

threat.title: Threat Diagnostic Layer
threat.description: The Threat Diagnostic Layer evaluates the external pressure on your organization from current and emerging threats.
items: Sector-specific threat landscape and actor profiles
Ransomware, data breach, and fraud exposure
Attack surface and vulnerability posture
Incident readiness and response scenarios
Impact of emerging vulnerabilities and campaigns

enterprise.title: Enterprise Diagnostic Layer
enterprise.description: The Enterprise Diagnostic Layer assesses the internal reality of your organization: capabilities, dependencies, and resilience under stress.
items: Controls, architecture, and security engineering maturity
Processes and workflows across teams and business units
Data flows, critical assets, and "crown jewels"
Vendor, partner, and supply chain dependencies
Operational resilience, continuity, and recovery capabilities

sublayers.conclusion: Together, these sublayers form a single method:
sublayers.conclusionText: the Strategic Threat & Enterprise Evaluation Layer. It is one diagnostic layer with internal structure—not a list of independent acronym pillars.

steelIndex.title: The STEEL™ Index
steelIndex.intro: To make STEEL™ actionable, ERMITS Advisory expresses the diagnostic as the
steelIndex.description: a unified view of where you stand and what must happen next.
steelIndex.combines: The STEEL™ Index combines three underlying scores:

strategic.name: Strategic Score (S-score)
strategic.description: governance alignment, risk appetite clarity, and integration of cyber into business decision-making.

threat.name: Threat Score (T-score)
threat.description: exposure to active and emerging threats, attack surface readiness, and incident readiness.

enterprise.name: Enterprise Score (E-score)
enterprise.description: capability maturity across controls, architecture, workflows, vendors, and resilience.

steelIndex.purpose: The STEEL™ Index is a weighted aggregation of these scores. Its purpose is not to chase a perfect number, but to guide:
guidance: Governance and oversight focus at leadership level
Which ERMITS ecosystem capabilities should be activated first
Reporting to executives and boards based on evidence, not anecdotes

ecosystem.title: How STEEL™ Connects Advisory to the ERMITS Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: STEEL™ is the bridge between ERMITS Advisory and the ERMITS ecosystem capabilities. It determines where attention, budget, and effort should go, and which capabilities should be activated.
ecosystem.mappingTitle: Mapping STEEL™ sublayers to the ERMITS Ecosystem
ecosystem.mappingDescription: Each layer of the STEEL™ diagnostic framework connects directly to specialized capabilities within the ERMITS ecosystem. Together, they create a closed-loop system for governance, risk management, and resilience.

strategicLayer.title: Strategic Diagnostic Layer
strategicLayer.description: Assesses business context, governance maturity, stakeholder alignment, and risk appetite.
strategicLayer.capabilities: ERMITS Advisory Services – vCISO Stewardship, GRC+ Advisory, Executive & Board Reporting

threatLayer.title: Threat Diagnostic Layer
threatLayer.description: Evaluates threat landscape, adversary tactics, operational readiness, and incident response capability.
threatLayer.capabilities: Threat intelligence, incident response, and operational readiness capabilities

enterpriseLayer.title: Enterprise Diagnostic Layer
enterpriseLayer.description: Examines technology architecture, vendor ecosystem, operational dependencies, and control implementation.
enterpriseLayer.cyberSoluce: Solution design, architecture, and technology enablement
enterpriseLayer.vendorSoluce: Vendor and supply chain risk governance

ecosystem.closedLoop: As these capabilities execute and generate evidence, telemetry flows back into STEEL™. This keeps your STEEL™ Index—and your decision-making—continuously current.

finalCta.title: Ready to Get Started?
finalCta.description: Let's discuss how STEEL™ can strengthen your organization's risk posture.
